title: A 600-mile road trip (and data) proves EV charging doesn’t suck anymore
summary: To find chargers, I used A Better Route Planner (ABRP), an app that optimizes charging stops by accounting for everything from prevailing winds and temperature to vehicle specs and battery degradation.
caption: output/2026-07-18/a-600-mile-road-trip-and-data-proves-ev-charging-doesn-t-suck-anymore.txt
